name: sentry
description: Monitor errors, track issues, and manage Sentry projects

envVars.name: SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN
envVars.description: Sentry Auth Token for API access

tools.name: List Projects
tools.description: List all projects in your Sentry organization

tools.name: List Issues
tools.description: List issues/errors in a Sentry project with optional filters

tools.name: Get Issue
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific Sentry issue

tools.name: Resolve Issue
tools.description: Mark a Sentry issue as resolved

prompts.title: Check recent errors
prompts.prompt: Show me recent errors and issues in my Sentry projects and help me prioritize which ones to fix.

prompts.title: Analyze an issue
prompts.prompt: Help me analyze a specific Sentry issue, understand its root cause, and suggest a fix.

prompts.title: Project health check
prompts.prompt: Give me an overview of the health of my Sentry projects, including error rates and trending issues.
